title: Removal of barriers in critical health routed by autophagy
author: Roy, Sudipta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Autophagy is a cellular process with four main stages: Initiation: Formation of the phagophore or isolation membrane. Formation: Expansion of the phagophore to form the autophagosome.
steps_raw: Autophagy is a cellular process with four main stages: Initiation: Formation of the phagophore or isolation membrane. Formation: Expansion of the phagophore to form the autophagosome.
